testcase.name: test_admin_login_returns_success_token

testcase.name: test_call_next_moves_patient_to_called_state

failure.message: AssertionError: {'0': {'display_number': 0, 'patient_id': None, 'patient_name': None, 'success': False}, 'success': True} assert 'clinicId' in {}

testcase.name: test_complete_patient_advances_route

testcase.name: test_transfer_patient_moves_to_target_clinic_waiting

failure.message: AssertionError: {'0': {'display_number': 0, 'patient_id': None, 'patient_name': None, 'success': False}, 'success': True} assert None == 'xray' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc70f06a7280>('clinicId') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc70f06a7280> = {}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_v1_queue_admin_contract.py:174: in test_transfer_patient_moves_to_target_clinic_waiting assert data.get("clinicId") == "xray", body E AssertionError: {'0': {'display_number': 0, 'patient_id': None, 'patient_name': None, 'success': False}, 'success': True} E assert None == 'xray' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc70f06a7280>('clinicId') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc70f06a7280> = {}.get
